message:
perf(tools): OnceLock caching for rg/fd detection + zero-context-window guard

src/tools.rs:
- Cache rg_available() result in a static OnceLock<bool> so the "rg
  --version" subprocess is spawned at most once per process lifetime
  instead of on every GrepTool invocation. On a typical session with
  hundreds of grep calls, this eliminates hundreds of fork+exec cycles.
- Similarly cache find_fd_binary() in a static OnceLock<Option<&str>>
  to avoid repeated "fd --version" / "fdfind --version" probes
- Remove the now-dead map_normalized_range_to_original() function and
  the redundant FuzzyMatchResult struct definition (~75 lines) that
  were left behind after the fuzzy match simplification in the previous
  commit — the struct is defined elsewhere and these were duplicates

src/main.rs:
- Add a guard for models that report context_window=0: log a warning
  and fall back to ResolvedCompactionSettings::default() context window
  instead of passing zero to the compaction engine, which would cause
  it to compact on every turn (since any token count > 0 exceeds a
  0-token window)
- Wire the actual model context_window into ResolvedCompactionSettings
  instead of relying on ..Default::default() which used a hardcoded
  fallback that might not match the selected model's real window size

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
